channel.title: Huntress Labs Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Huntress Labs Inc. (huntress).

item.title: CVE-2025-14611 · 7.1 HIGH 💥 🌩️ — Gladinet CentreStack and TrioFox Hard Coded AES Keys
item.description: Gladinet CentreStack and Triofox prior to version 16.12.10420.56791 used hardcoded values for their implementation of the AES cryptoscheme. This degrades security for public exposed endpoints that may make use of it and may offer arbitrary local file…

item.title: CVE-2025-11371 · 7.5 HIGH 💥 🌩️ — Gladinet CentreStack and TrioFox Local File Inclusion Flaw
item.description: In the default installation and configuration of Gladinet CentreStack and TrioFox, there is an unauthenticated Local File Inclusion Flaw that allows unintended disclosure of system files. Exploitation of this vulnerability has been observed in the wi…
